# Role

Access levels a caller can hold.

Used by the `@auth` directive to gate fields.

## Values

- **`CUSTOMER`** — A signed-in shopper.
- **`GUEST`** — Anyone, including unauthenticated callers.
- **`STAFF`** — A member of shop staff.
